positive: A symmetrical, minimalist graphic illustration of celestial botanicals, featuring stylized crescent moons, intertwining cosmic roots, and glowing nebula flora. The design must have strong, clean silhouettes, resembling a complex yet balanced mandala pattern. Style is modern psychedelic tattoo art meets Art Deco symmetry, rendered in a vector illustration style. Utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, and vibrant lavender against a neutral background. The composition is centered and highly detailed, suitable for a large apparel print. High contrast, clean edges, vibrant color gradients.
